source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body circular flange joint assembly consisting of: (A) two S355 steel machined flanges (OD 200 mm, ID 80 mm, thickness 20 mm each); (B) eight M12 x 1.75 property class 10.9 bolts on a 160 mm bolt circle (22.5 deg pitch); (C) eight hardened washers under the bolt heads and/or nuts per VDI 2230 practice. S355 properties: yield 355 MPa, UTS 510 MPa, Young's modulus 210 GPa, density 7850 kg/m^3. M12 class 10.9 catalog values (industrial fastener handbook 2024): proof load F_p = 59.5 kN, yield load F_y = 76.8 kN, ultimate F_ult = 85.3 kN, stress area 84.3 mm^2, recommended preload F_M = 50.1 kN at 90% yield with friction 0.14 (VDI 2230 Table A1), tightening torque 117 N*m dry.

Service load cases: LC1 pure axial tension 200 kN through the bore centerline shared across bolts; LC2 pure bending moment 8 kN*m about a flange diameter; LC3 combined axial 150 kN + bending 6 kN*m + transverse shear 30 kN across the joint plane. Pass/fail on the assembled model per VDI 2230 + ISO 898-1: (R1) max individual bolt total load F_B_max = F_M + F_SA <= 0.9 * F_y = 69.1 kN; (R2) min bolt load F_B_min > 0 (no gapping) under all LC; (R3) joint-face surface pressure under washer / bolt head <= 0.8 * yield_flange = 284 MPa; (R4) flange face max von Mises under LC3 <= 355 / 1.5 = 237 MPa; (R5) flange gap at outermost bolt radius under LC2 max moment <= 0 (water/gas-tight); (R6) bolt shank combined von Mises <= F_y / A_stress = 912 MPa under LC3; (R_asm1) bolt-preload + joint-stiffness DCR per VDI 2230 Part 1 across every bolt <= 1.0 under LC1, LC2, LC3.

Manufacturing: forge / machine flanges per drawing; drill 8 bolt holes on 160 mm PCD; assemble with 8 x M12 class 10.9 bolts torqued to 117 N*m dry per industrial fastener handbook. The final FEM check runs on the fully assembled model (two flanges + 8 bolt envelopes + washers) with pretensioned bolt elements and contact at the flange faying surface. Per-part stress is reported (max von Mises per flange, per bolt shank) but assembly-level passing requires all VDI 2230 DCRs, the gap-zero constraint, and surface-pressure limits to hold simultaneously.

Deliverables: STEP AP242 of the bolted flange assembly with flange_1, flange_2, 8 bolt bodies, and 8 washer bodies as distinct bodies tagged with part_family and instance_index; report listing per-bolt F_B_max / F_B_min, surface pressure under head, flange max von Mises, max gap at the outermost bolt under LC2, bolt shank combined stress, per-part max stress, and assembly-level connection DCRs.
short_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body circular-flange joint delivered as an assembly: two S355 machined flanges (OD 200 mm, ID 80 mm, thickness 20 mm each; yield 355 MPa, UTS 510 MPa, E = 210 GPa, rho = 7850 kg/m^3), eight M12 x 1.75 property class 10.9 bolts on a 160 mm bolt circle (22.5 deg pitch), plus eight hardened washers per VDI 2230 practice. M12 class 10.9 catalog: F_p = 59.5 kN, F_y = 76.8 kN, F_ult = 85.3 kN, stress area 84.3 mm^2, recommended preload F_M = 50.1 kN at 90% yield with friction 0.14 (VDI 2230 Table A1), tightening torque 117 N*m dry.

Load cases.
- LC1 pure axial tension: 200 kN through the bore centerline.
- LC2 pure bending: 8 kN*m about a flange diameter.
- LC3 combined: axial 150 kN + bending 6 kN*m + transverse shear 30 kN.

Pass limits per VDI 2230 + ISO 898-1: max bolt total F_B <= 0.9 * F_y = 69.1 kN; min bolt F_B > 0 (no gapping); surface pressure under head <= 0.8 * 355 = 284 MPa; flange von Mises at LC3 <= 355/1.5 = 237 MPa; bolt shank combined von Mises under LC3 <= 912 MPa.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: VDI 2230 Part 1 closed-form bolted-joint analysis covering preload, joint stiffness, and additional load is a spreadsheet.

prompt.title: Eight-bolt M12 10.9 steel circular flange joint (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-body bolted flange: two S355 flanges + 8 x M12 class 10.9 bolts + 8 washers. Must survive 200 kN axial + 8 kNm bending without gap or bolt yield per VDI 2230 + industrial fastener handbook. Final FEM check runs on the assembled model with pretensioned bolts.

parts.name: steel_flange
parts.role: S355 circular flange (OD 200 ID 80 thickness 20) that forms one half of the bolted joint

parts.name: flange_bolt
parts.role: M12 x 1.75 property class 10.9 bolt at 22.5 deg pitch on the 160 mm bolt circle

parts.name: hardened_washer
parts.role: hardened washer under bolt head / nut per VDI 2230 practice to limit surface pressure

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: 200 mm dia x (40 mm flanges + bolt head/nut stacks)
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: Flange axis along Z; bolt circle in the XY plane

boundary_conditions.inter_part_fastener_stiffness: pretensioned bolts (F_M = 50.1 kN) with contact + friction at the faying surface per VDI 2230

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: 0.9 * yield load = 0.9 * 76.8 per VDI 2230 utilization limit
assembly-scope DCR across every bolt per VDI 2230 Part 1 (preload + additional operating load)
Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

requirements.governing_standard: ISO 898-1 + VDI 2230 Part 1 + industrial fastener handbook (2024)

analysis_types: nonlinear static with bolt preload + contact

interfaces.load_path: flange-to-flange faying surface with preload-induced clamping; transmits axial/shear by friction + contact
bolt shank through each flange clearance hole; bolt preload clamps the faying surface
bolt head / nut bears on washer; washer spreads load onto flange top face

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: A bolted circular flange joint is fundamentally a multi-body system (two flanges + eight preloaded bolts + washers) whose load sharing requires explicit bolt bodies; single-body models cannot resolve per-bolt F_B_max or the gap-zero constraint.
notes.speculation_caveats: Bolt and washer counts are set by the 8 x M12 / 160 mm bolt circle in the original sample; washer bodies are speculated as a VDI 2230 convention.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
